title: Hierarchy of Pandas Objects
description: A visual breakdown of the core Pandas data structures and their relationships, showing how they form a hierarchy from simple data elements to complex tabular structures.
relationships: A DataFrame is a collection of Series objects sharing the same Index
A Series is built from a Data (NumPy Array) and an Index
An Index labels the rows (DataFrame) or elements (Series)
Scalar Values are extracted from Series or DataFrame cells
